text: Curiosity mixes with a hint of impatience as I hear the repeated request, "Do another one." In the first scene, separated by glass, I observe a gathering or meeting—a collective intellect at work. I feel apart, an outsider peering into the rhythms of collaboration. In the next moment, color and bold text wash over me. Standing before the R+D wall, surrounded by displays of innovation, I feel swept up in a current of discovery. Each exhibit invites further reflection—what does it truly mean to connect and coexist with intelligence, as the wall suggests? Here, isolated in wonder, I sense both the vigor of invention and the perpetual urge to ask: What comes next? I am both witness and participant in the ceaseless momentum of creation.
